input.command:
python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-01-28':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

---

Title: Who will Benjamin Netanyahu say is set to visit Israel soon, by February 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-15. Israel is engaged in active diplomacy and may announce upcoming visits by foreign leaders. This question concerns a publicly announced future visit by a sitting prime minister.
---

Title: Which West African country will have all political parties dissolved by the end of January 2026?
